characters.name: Abuela Mariposa
characters.description: Abuela MarisposaBornMexico City, MexicoNationalityMexicanGenderFemale ♀FamilyMariaandCeci Mariposa(daughters)Carmen Mariposa(granddaughter) Abuela Mariposais a character who appears onLet's Go Luna!. She is the grandmother ofCarmen Mariposa, and the mother ofMariaandCeci Mariposa. She died when Carmen was young, and was also the previous owner of her granddaughter's guitar.

characters.name: Andy Hopper
characters.description: Andy is an artist who is quite skilled at painting, sketching and other forms of art. He is also good at photography. His mother is a costume designer for the traveling circus and his father is the prop designer, which acts as his inspiration for wanting to become an painter. Of the trio, Andy is often portrayed as the most interested in his unfamiliar surroundings. However, he becomes more comfortable after he learns more about each nation's culture. Though he does get grumpy every now and then (like in "Stairway to Art Day", "Rhinoceros or Bust", and "The Potato King") and got into a fight with Carmen once, he is the nicest kid of the trio (Carmen previously held this title, but has become more demanding, self-centered, and dismissive), as he wants to make friends with everyone and is rather friendly and outgoing.

characters.name: Auggie
characters.description: AuggieBornSydney, AustraliaNationalityAustralianGenderMale ♂FriendsLuna the Moon,Leo,Andy,Finn,HoneyandCarmenVoiced byScott McCordAugust, nicknamedAuggie, is an Australian frog who throws boomerangs with his friendFinn. When we first met him, he was eating a jar of Boomymite Spread. But then, he got a massive belly ache because he wound up eating too much Boomymite Spread. So,Carmen Mariposatook his place in a competition. He is voiced byScott McCord, who was uncredited for his role.
